title: Tessa Manchisco
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Manchisco_TABSB.jpg]] |name=Tessa Manchisco |homeworld=[[Virgillia 7]]''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],According to ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'', the [[Battle of Bakura]] occurred shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' dates to 4 ABY. ''[[Flurry]]''''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Virgillian]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] **[[Virgillian Free Alignment Starfleet]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Virgillia. Welcome. Do you need refueling? You've arrived at an opportune moment. We're about to jump.''"
"''Battle?''"
"''Confirmed. Big one...maybe our last, if we lose. We can use you.''"
"''We've got one wounded bird, but the rest of us are spoiling for a real fight. Top us off and transmit jump coordinates.''"
"''Splendid. Welcome to the Rebel Alliance.|A Rebel Alliance member and Tessa Manchisco, upon the arrival of the Virgillian task force near Sullust|{{WEGCite|story=Newest Rebels|book=The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook}}}} '''Tessa Manchisco''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] officer who served in the [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] during the latter stages of the [[Virgillian Civil War]]. She had green eyes and black hair that she wore, in Virgillian fashion, in six braids, three on either side of her head. She spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and [[Durese/Legends|Durese]]. By the end of the Civil War she had become captain of the light carrier ''[[Flurry]]'', on which she continued to serve when the Alignment lent it to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. She commanded it during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the [[Bakura Incident]], where she was killed with the rest of the ''Flurry's'' crew when the ship was destroyed. She received posthumous decoration for her service.''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}} *{{WEGCite|story=Newest Rebels|book=The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook}} ==Sources== *''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tessa Manchisco |es=Tessa Manchisco }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Manchisco, Tessa}} [[Category:Alliance Army officers]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Virgillian Free Alignment members]]
